title: Refined Aether
description: A resource pack that aims to change some of the textures from the Aether mod and some of it's addons to be more distinct and visually pleasing.
body:
![The Modrinth Pages's Banner.](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100627533118066698/1105346412952166430/page_banner.png)



Refined Aether is a resource pack for the Aether mod which aims to rework, retexture, and refine some of the mod's textures to be more distinct when compared to their vanilla counterparts and, overall, in my opinion, more visually pleasing.

The pack also includes some support for Deep Aether and Aether: Lost Content, two Aether addon mods I would highly recommend.



Note* The pack doesn't retexture ALL of the mod's textures, nor do I plan to do them all, it merely retextures those which I thought I could improve. However, updates to the pack will come which may include new textures, but that depends if/when I get the time to do them.




Any Questions?:

Q: Can I include this resource pack in my modpack/installation/youtube series/playthrough?

A: Yes, of course, you can use the pack however you like, you can even create an edit of the pack and upload it either here on Modrinth or on Curseforge, as long as you link to the original and credit me for my textures on whatever modpack, video, or edit (and don't just repost my pack unedited or barely edited to a site I don't approve of) you are completely in the clear!




Q: Will you add textures for (insert Aether mod addon here)

A: As more Aether mod addons release and are developed, i'll be keeping track and if I wish to add support for them in the pack, I will.
Overall, it mostly depends on the Aether addon in question.




Q: Will you make a "Refined (insert mod name here)" Resource pack?


A: I have a couple more packs for the Refined Resource Packs series planned, but I only want to do mods' textures I both want to improve and think I can improve, 
feel free though to suggest some to me on the Aether 's discord, where Refined Aether has a post where you can chat under the "projects" section. 
(You can find a link to the Aether Team's discord server on either the Aether's Modrinth or Curseforge page)
